title: Title
sourceNameDescription: Name the chef, publication, or partner behind the source.
sourceUrlDescription: Optional, but recommended when the original source is public.
attributionTextPlaceholder: Adapted from a Jamie Oliver recipe.
attributionTextDescription: Shown on the recipe detail page when the recipe is not original.
userOriginalHelper: Use this when the recipe is fully your own original work.
inspiredByChefHelper: Use this when you rewrote the recipe in your own words but it was inspired by a known chef.
adaptedFromExternalHelper: Use this when your recipe closely follows an external source and needs visible attribution.
licensedPartnerHelper: Use this only when you have explicit permission or a license to publish the recipe.
ingredientsDescription: List all ingredients and their quantities.
imagesDescription: Upload 2 great photos of your finished recipe. Good photos make your recipe more appealing and help others try it!
orClickToBrowse: Or click to browse (max 2 photos, up to 5MB each)
validationTitleMin: Title must be at least 3 characters.
validationDescriptionMin: Description must be at least 10 characters.
validationSourceAttributionRequired: For non-original recipes, add source name or attribution text.
validationLicensedRightsStatus: Licensed partner recipes must use rights status: Licensed.
validationPrepTimeMin: Prep time must be 0 or more.
validationPrepTimeMax: Prep time must be less than 24 hours.
validationCookTimeMin: Cook time must be 0 or more.
validationCookTimeMax: Cook time must be less than 24 hours.
validationIngredientsMin: At least one ingredient is required.
validationInstructionMin: Instruction must be at least 5 characters.
validationInstructionsMin: At least one instruction is required.
